flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Berkeley College-Woodland Park fell 47% between 2007 and 2009 (55.6% → 29.7%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 27% at Berkeley College-Woodland Park vs the 2018–2022 baseline (1.8k vs 2.5k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Berkeley College-Woodland Park rose 18% between 2017 and 2020 ($19.8k → $23.3k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Berkeley College-Woodland Park fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (2.0k → 1.8k).
